Petition To Modify Trust To Clarify Trustee Investment Authority, Modify Limitation On Trustee Compensation, Ratify Prior Investments, And Permit Future Change Of Situs Of Administration And Governing Law
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To Mar-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Burnstein for Bank of America (Trustee).

Mr. Burnstein addressed the issues raised in the Examinse's notes with regard to the Bank investing in it's own products, the compensation issue and conflict of interest. Mr. Burnstein also stated that he would revise the language regarding non-monetary payment, present the Court's concerns/changes to his Client and submit a proposed order. The matter was continued to March 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
